title: The Dragon's Ingredient
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing5, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+; ing3+ing4=neutral → ing3 has R-), ing5=R- (ing5 R?: (sign undetermined))
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+; ing3+ing4=neutral → ing3 has R-), ing7=R+ (ing7+ing8=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing3 has G+; ing3+ing4=neutral → ing4 has G-; ing3+ing4=neutral → ing3 has G+), ing7=G- (ing7 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B- (ing3+ing8=B-: both share B-), ing7=B- (ing7 has B-)
      → SAME sign - → B- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R+ (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+), ing7=R+ (ing7+ing8=R+: both share R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.
